name: Shrimp Fra Diavolo
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion and garlic in olive oil for 3 minutes.
2. Add remaining ingredients, except shrimp and pasta. Stir well.
3. Simmer the mixture for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Add shrimp to the sauce and simmer until the shrimp are translucent, about 4 minutes.
5. Cook the chosen pasta according to package directions, then drain.
6. Top the pasta with the sauce and serve hot. Enjoy!
